jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at 1mg
jsonLd.description:
1mg invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About 1mg:
1mg is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg!
